channel_is_value_bearing.LIN-TOP (toponym external referent): YES - only channel that derives a value from outside LB
channel_is_value_bearing.LIN-PN (onomastic resemblance): NO - value-blind; no external referent constrains the string
channel_is_value_bearing.LIN-GLOSS (acrophonic): WEAK - single-sign guess, not held-out testable
channel_is_value_bearing.LIN-VAR (internal variation): NO - never pins a value by construction (ic4)
channel_is_value_bearing.LIN-H (homomorphy): NO - sign-IDENTITY; inherits LB value (this IS the GORILA transcription substrate)
channel_is_value_bearing.LIN-C (Cypriot stability): NO - sign continuity; inherits LB/Greek value

summary.non_circular_note: Conventional LA values label records only; no value is a model input. Held-out numbers are cited from the frozen preregistered cross-script gate, not re-run.

audit_rows.page_record: S&M 2017 Table 6.4 p.102 (bold in Table 6.3 p.101); carried from toponym_anchors.csv
audit_rows.chronology: LA Neopalatial (MM III-LM IB, ~1600-1450 BCE); comparandum LB Mycenaean (~1400-1200 BCE)

rule_complexity.note: one LB value asserted per covered sign simultaneously

audit_rows.heldout_prediction: if value correct, held-out LA distribution should re-derive it (LOTO)
audit_rows.failure_status: RECOVERED_BUT_ONE-TOPONYM-DEEP (I); non-survivable if that toponym also held out
